mechanism_narrative: Positive 3-month PAYEMS momentum signals expanding payroll income and near-term revenue support; higher payroll growth predicts positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:PAYEMS latest vintage available on 2018-03-15 was 148177 thousand for 2018-02-01
failure_condition: Reject if higher 3-month PAYEMS growth has Rank IC below 0.03 for 20-day S&P 500 returns over any 3-year rolling walk-forward window.

mechanism_narrative: An upward FEDFUNDS crossing marks tighter discount-rate conditions; when the policy rate rises through its prior 12-month high, S&P 500 returns are negative over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS crosses above its prior 12-month maximum
evidence_refs: fact:FEDFUNDS latest vintage available on 2018-03-15 was 1.42 for 2018-02-01
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations produce positive 20-day S&P 500 returns more than 60% of the time or if the triggered mean return is not below the unconditional mean.

mechanism_narrative: When CPIAUCSL growth exceeds RSAFS growth, real consumption momentum is squeezed; this margin-pressure demand mix predicts negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:CPIAUCSL and RSAFS February 2018 vintages were available by 2018-03-15
failure_condition: Reject if the CPIAUCSL-minus-RSAFS growth spread has nonnegative Rank IC for negative 20-day returns in two consecutive 3-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: Rising INDPRO over the prior 6 months signals improving production volumes and operating leverage; stronger industrial production momentum predicts positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:INDPRO latest vintage available on 2018-03-15 was 107.2433 for 2018-01-01
failure_condition: Reject if 6-month INDPRO momentum fails to sort future 60-day S&P 500 returns monotonically across terciles in at least 70% of walk-forward test folds.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp decline in HOUST signals weakening housing demand and tighter household balance-sheet conditions; a downside housing break predicts negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST falls more than 10% from its trailing 6-month average
evidence_refs: fact:HOUST latest vintage available on 2018-03-15 was 1326 thousand units for 2018-01-01
failure_condition: Reject if triggered HOUST declines are followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns more than 60% of the time and by no drawdown increase versus baseline.

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month UNRATE increase signals deteriorating labor demand and recession-risk repricing; when unemployment rises quickly, S&P 500 returns are negative over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by more than 0.3 percentage points over 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:UNRATE latest vintage available on 2018-03-15 was 4.1 percent for 2018-02-01
failure_condition: Reject if the UNRATE-rise trigger has a positive average 20-day S&P 500 return or if its hit rate for negative returns is not above the unconditional negative-return rate.

mechanism_narrative: High FEDFUNDS combined with low UNRATE marks late-cycle policy restraint at full employment; this interaction compresses valuation multiples and predicts negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS is above its 24-month average and UNRATE is below its 24-month average
evidence_refs: fact:2018-03-15 snapshot showed FEDFUNDS at 1.42 and UNRATE at 4.1
regime_hint: late-cycle monetary tightening at low unemployment
failure_condition: Reject if the joint FEDFUNDS-high and UNRATE-low state does not underperform other states for 60-day S&P 500 returns in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent gains in GDPC1 and RSAFS identify broad demand acceleration; when quarterly output and monthly retail sales both rise, S&P 500 returns are positive over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 quarter-over-quarter growth is positive and RSAFS 3-month growth is positive
evidence_refs: fact:GDPC1 2017-10-01 and RSAFS 2018-02-01 vintages were available by 2018-03-15
failure_condition: Reject if the joint positive GDPC1 and RSAFS trigger has a 5-day forward return hit rate no higher than the unconditional positive-rate baseline.
